text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 49 

DED_APPLY_ALL 

LABEL: Type of Cost Sharing in the Part D plan Deductible Phase 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether there is cost sharing on any tiers in the deductible phase and, if so, 
whether the part D plan uses the same cost sharing in the deductible phase as in the pre-ICL phase or 
if some other unspecified cost sharing is applied. 

TYPE: CHAR
